channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Common Sweetener May Harm Critical Brain Barrier, Risking Stroke - ScienceAlert
item.description:
1. Common Sweetener May Harm Critical Brain Barrier, Risking Stroke  ScienceAlert
  2. Is your “sugar-free” soda causing your brain to age? A study of 12,772 people links artificial sweeteners to cognitive decline that is up to 62% faster  OkDiario
  3. Liquid sugar enters Alzheimer's radar: Framingham study with over 4 thousand participants links sodas, industrialized teas, and sugary drinks to smaller brain volume, worse memory, and silent signs of brain aging.  CPG Click Petróleo e Gás
  4. It’s not sugar, but it’s not magic either: the “sugar-free” sweetener found in keto bars and diet sodas could set off the brain’s defense mechanisms  OkDiario
  5. The zero-sugar soda that seemed like a smart choice enters science's radar: a Brazilian study links artificial sweeteners to faster memory decline and accelerated brain aging.  CPG Click Petróleo e Gás
